jobs.prompt: Focused paper figure, only the data preprocessing path. Show a Parati audio file waveform converted into one log-power spectrogram. Include compact labels: sr 32 kHz, fixed length 454400, STFT, log-power spectrogram, shape 1 x 801 x 1421. Use left-to-right flow with three main blocks: audio, STFT, spectrogram. Do not show the neural network or training stages.

Focused paper figure, only the PersonalizedEncoder backbone. Show one input spectrogram entering a compact six-block CNN stack, then adaptive average pooling, then a 256-d pooled feature. Use concise block labels: Conv1 1 to 32, Conv2 32 to 64, Conv3 64 to 128, Conv4 128 to 192, Conv5 192 to 224, Conv6 224 to 256, AvgPool, 256-d feature. Do not show projection head, regression head, metrics, or optimizer.

Focused paper figure, only the contrastive projection head. Show a 256-d pooled feature passing through Linear 256 to 512, Linear 512 to 256, Linear 256 to 128, then L2 normalize to a 128-d embedding. Add a small contrastive-learning cue with anchor, positive, and negative embeddings around the final embedding space. Do not show the CNN layers or regression output.

Focused paper figure, only the default FC regression head. Show a 256-d pooled backbone feature flowing through Linear 256 to 60, Linear 60 to 50, Linear 50 to 12, then a simple 12-point AudioScan curve. Include compact frequency labels as tick marks: 250, 500, 1K, 2K, 4K, 8K, 12.5K. Do not show pretraining, optimizer, validation, or non-default attention heads.

Focused paper figure, only the two-stage training schedule. Use two large horizontal panels: Stage A contrastive encoder pretraining with anchor positive negative spectrograms, projection head, ContrastiveLoss, Adam; Stage B regression training with pretrained encoder, FC regressor, L1Loss, AdamW, best checkpoint by subject_median_curve_mae. Keep each panel visually simple with no detailed layer list.

Focused paper figure, only the target construction. Show repeated AudioScan measurements grouped by Subject plus earphone, aggregated by median, producing one stable 12-point absolute target curve. Use four main blocks: raw rows, grouping key, median aggregation, target curve. Do not show audio preprocessing, encoder layers, or training loss.
